name: SolarpunkSurvival
engine: Unreal Engine 5 (IoStore; exe stamped UE5-CL-0, exact minor TBD via UE4SS dump)
ue4ssVersion: Solarpunk-patched UE4SS (Nexus mod 4, SP Developer 1.0.3) — stock UE4SS cannot scan UE 5.7.1
notes: Install with install.ps1 (see docs/INSTALL.md). The content pak carries the wands, the Tempest Codex and its research cards; without it the Lua mod still runs, minus those items.
